name: Starter Assessment
description: Initial movement assessment and personalized corrective plan. Includes a full-body posture analysis and your first Functional Patterns session.

name: Foundation Program
description: A focused 6-session program designed to establish your movement foundations and correct the most impactful dysfunctions.

name: Transformation Package
description: The complete 12-session transformation journey. Addresses root movement dysfunctions, builds functional strength, and creates lasting change.
